notes: Disk-space: transcode/DV/compat jobs now check the temp drive up front and fail instantly with a clear 'not enough temp space' message instead of running 20 min then dying on 'No space left on device'. Restarting a node (e.g. after an update) now auto-releases its in-progress jobs instead of stranding them. Security: the public dashboard endpoint no longer exposes API keys/passwords. Node v2.21 + server v3.29.
